hooks.prompt: Hook-injected context does not survive compaction. If the wiki hot cache exists (hot.md at the top of the configured wiki root — wiki/hot.md by default), silently re-read it now to restore the hot cache. Do not announce this.

If any files under the configured wiki root (wiki/ by default) were created or edited this session, rewrite its hot.md now: under 500 words, overwrite completely, keep its existing section shape (Last Updated, Identity, Active Projects, Recent Milestones, Current Threads, Roles & Communities, Engineering Focus, This Vault). If nothing under the wiki root changed, do nothing.
